tagline: AI × 3D character pipeline · Tool rankings + hands-on course

hero.title_b: which one wins at each step?
hero.sub: One pipeline, from sketch to engine. Read the rankings, then follow BlueCat's course end to end and build a finished character ready for Unity / UE5.

lb.intro: We put the leading AI 3D tools through the key steps of the character pipeline and ranked them one by one — BlueCat tests every one by hand, judged purely on how well it works. Hand the slow steps to AI; the craft, BlueCat trains you in.

pipe.h2: One pipeline, from sketch to engine
pipe.intro: Nine steps, each one building on the last, each giving you an output you can check. Hand the slow, automatable work to AI; the craft that truly decides the outcome, BlueCat trains you in.

mentor.h2: Reading the rankings isn't enough — you only learn by doing it
mentor.role: Digital-human product manager / bluecatbot.com owner / Bilibili creator
mentor.name: BlueCat
mentor.bio: Over the past few years I've walked the whole path of how AI reshaped the 3D and digital-human pipeline, step by step — which tools actually work, which are hype, and which steps you have to rescue by hand. I've hit every pitfall. Almost no one lays it out systematically: tutorials are everywhere, but there's no single path that takes you all the way from concept to an engine-ready character in one go. This course is the complete path I wish someone had just handed me back then.

course.h2: BlueCat coaches you through building your own character
course.intro: I'll walk you down this pipeline from start to finish — 9 modules, one project throughout. When you're done, you'll hold a character ready for your portfolio and ready for the engine.

faq.h2: Still on the fence? Answers here

fcta.h2: Ready to build your own character?
fcta.p: Read the tool rankings, then follow the 9-step pipeline end to end. Hand the slow steps to AI; the craft, BlueCat trains you in.
